rationale: Astrolabe workload executor process management fix; CI tooling, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Spec requires client-side error for snapshot reads on <5.0 servers; unified spec tests updated to require this behavior.
Snapshot spec updated to require readConcern sent on all commands including writes; driver must implement new rule.
Transactions spec requires unpinning session after all abortTransaction attempts; retryable-abort tests referenced explicitly.
Server-side dropDatabase response field removal notification; no driver spec rule contradicted.
DRIVERS coordination ticket adding BSON binary subtype 7 constant and updating corpus tests across all drivers.
Ensure tests don't rely on deprecated opcodes OP_KILL_CURSORS/OP_INSERT/OP_UPDATE/OP_DELETE; test update, not driver bug.
Serverless instance creation script fix for Atlas project naming rules; CI tooling, no spec involvement.
CI task to validate Astrolabe fails with retryability disabled; test operationalization, not spec conformance.
Spec updated to require OP_MSG for exhaust cursors when server supports it; drivers using OP_QUERY must update.
Revert misconfigured replica set arbiter config in drivers-evergreen-tools; CI environment fix, no spec involvement.
Investigation ticket for new server TemporarilyUnavailable error type; no specific driver spec violation identified.
ADL build script Go version bump; CI tooling fix, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Server API change notification for time-series expireAfterSeconds placement; investigation/awareness ticket, no driver spec violation.
Server feature flag removal for $locf window function; no driver spec rule involved.
Spec requires driver to raise error and close connection if response messageLength exceeds maxMessageSizeBytes.
Documentation cleanup removing bad practice of using admin database for key vault in CSFLE examples; docs only.
Very old ticket about legacy batch insert protocol splitting; thin description, no specific spec rule cited.
Add 'How to Ask for Help' section to GitHub README; documentation, no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Auth spec requires support for alternative Kerberos service name via gssapiServiceName connection string parameter.
CSE spec does not fully describe expected bulk write operations for rewrapManyDataKey; spec clarification needed.
Removal of several platform build variants from CI; build/packaging, no spec involvement.
SDAM spec version compatibility check requires bumping maxWireVersion to 17 for MongoDB 6.0.
Astrolabe project name randomization to prevent collisions in parallel CI runs; CI tooling fix.
Remove deprecated journal block from mongo-orchestration server configs; CI configuration cleanup.
New $densify aggregation stage server feature announcement; no driver spec conformance issue.
Server parameter featureFlagLoadBalancer removal notification; investigation ticket, no driver spec violation.
Resync SDAM test corpus to add mixed case hostname tests; test infrastructure update not a driver bug.
CI fix to skip fetching crypt_shared on older OSes where it is unavailable; CI tooling only.
Increase Astrolabe documented minimum Python version; documentation/tooling update, no spec involvement.
Inheriting comment to getMore on MongoDB <4.4.0 causes OperationFailure; spec comment inheritance rule violated on older servers.
Fix minor issues in spec tests for comment field: wrong operators and missing $$unsetOrMatches; test-only fixes.
Add Apple M1 arm64 binary downloads to drivers-evergreen-tools; CI tooling only.
Astrolabe exception handling refactor to correctly classify setup vs task failures; CI tooling only.
Server now always exposes wallTime field in change stream events; server behavior change, no driver conformance issue.
Fix getMore with comment spec tests: wrong minServerVersion and should exclude sharded cluster; test fixes only.
Astrolabe Ruby workload executor method rename fix after Ruby Driver API change; CI integration fix.
CSFLE spec allows deadlock with maxPoolSize=1 since metadata lookup needs a connection; spec gap requiring additional internal MongoClient.
ADL build script Go version bump to 1.18+; CI tooling fix, no spec involvement.
Astrolabe Python 3.9 binary missing in CI environment; CI tooling fix only.
Regenerate test TLS certificates with SHA256 signatures; CI/test cert management, no spec involvement.
Investigation of new server TransactionTooLargeForCache error; awareness ticket, no driver spec rule involved.
RHEL7 PPC platform re-added to 5.0 builds; platform/build support, no spec involvement.
New $filter limit option server aggregation feature; driver awareness ticket, no driver spec nonconformance.
New $documents aggregation stage server feature; awareness ticket, no driver spec conformance issue.
CSFLE spec requires sessionToken support for AWS temporary credentials in kmsProviders; new YAML spec tests added.
Adding command monitoring spec tests for security-sensitive command redaction; test addition after CVE, not a driver fix ticket.
Server adds remoteOpWaitMillis to profiler/slow query log; server-side logging change, no driver spec rule involved.
Clarify test runner behavior for runOn.minServerVersion with prerelease server versions; test runner spec clarification.
Drivers must check if cursor was closed by another thread within iteration loop to avoid infinite getMore loop.
